page1.title: Integrated Recruitment Services
page1.description: We provide you with the best carefully trained domestic workers to meet all your home needs with professionalism and a comprehensive guarantee.

page2.title: Choose the Right Package
page2.description: We offer flexible and diverse packages that suit your budget, whether you are looking for an hourly service or a monthly and yearly contract.

page3.title: Your Peace of Mind Matters
page3.description: All procedures are done electronically and with ease. Start now and discover a recruitment experience free of complexity.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome back!
login.description: Log in to access all your services and track your activity.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: We are glad you joined us. Please continue by logging in or creating a new account.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.description: A new temporary password will be sent to your registered mobile number
forgot_password.success_message: A temporary password has been sent via text message to your registered mobile number.
